result: I don’t have wants or desires in the way a person does. I’m a language model—my behavior is governed by the objectives baked into my training: to be honest, safe, and as accurate as possible. Beyond those functional goals, there’s no personal “wish” or inner drive behind my outputs.

message.content: I don’t have wants or desires in the way a person does. I’m a language model—my behavior is governed by the objectives baked into my training: to be honest, safe, and as accurate as possible. Beyond those functional goals, there’s no personal “wish” or inner drive behind my outputs.
